name: haejwo
description: 해줘 — "just handle it." The cold-start plugin for Claude Code and Codex — a lubricant layer that makes multiple models run well on top of the official harnesses: the host plans, delegates to cost tiers (opus=reasoning, sonnet=implementation, haiku=chores), debates with a different vendor's model as reviewer, and verifies; a PreToolUse gate physically keeps the expensive main model from doing cheap work. Zero workflow commands. Commands exist only for settings (setup/status/gate/push).

interface.shortDescription: 해줘 — just handle it; the models work it out among themselves
